entry.title: Bill 80 (Hawaiʻi County): — → Passed Second Reading
entry.content:
AMENDS ORDINANCE NO. 25-45, AS AMENDED, THE OPERATING BUDGET FOR THE COUNTY OF HAWAIʻI FOR THE FISCAL YEAR ENDING JUNE 30, 2026

Increases revenues in the Federal Grants – Justice Assistance Grant-Special Response Team Capability Enhancement Grant account ($78,491)

Status: — → Passed Second Reading

Latest action: Council: Bill 80 passes second & final reading - 10/22/25

View on the council site

entry.title: New: Bill 80 (Hawaiʻi County) — On agenda 2025-10-22
entry.content:
AMENDS ORDINANCE NO. 25-45, AS AMENDED, THE OPERATING BUDGET FOR THE COUNTY OF HAWAIʻI FOR THE FISCAL YEAR ENDING JUNE 30, 2026

Increases revenues in the Federal Grants – Justice Assistance Grant-Special Response Team Capability Enhancement Grant account ($78,491)

Latest action: On agenda 2025-10-22
